name: Building Design Studio Web
description: Professional interior and building design studio web application
readme:
# Building Design Studio

A professional interior and building design web application built with React Router, Hono, and TailwindCSS.

## Features

- SSR with React Router v7
- Hono backend API
- NextJS-style file routing
- Authentication with Auth.js
- NeonDB serverless database
- TailwindCSS styling
- Responsive design

## Deployment

This application is ready for deployment on Appwrite, Vercel, or any Node.js hosting platform.
